title: rubus hirtus var. bakabanyensis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. bakabanyensis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. bakabanyensis include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and consumed as a sweet and nutritious fruit.
